description: Account lookup, pipeline updates, follow-up planning, and sales recap workflows.
design_rules: Tasks must stay vendor-neutral within the category.
Tasks should be short enough for high sample count and repeated simulation.
Fake tools should preserve differentiated product logic, not just naming differences.

core_tasks.title: Lookup account context
core_tasks.goal: Retrieve account, contact, and recent activity context.

core_tasks.title: Update opportunity stage
core_tasks.goal: Move a deal/opportunity to a new stage with rationale.

core_tasks.title: Summarize pipeline risk
core_tasks.goal: Summarize risky deals and likely blockers.

core_tasks.title: Extract next sales actions
core_tasks.goal: Identify follow-ups, owners, and due dates.

core_tasks.title: Compare account history
core_tasks.goal: Compare recent interactions across accounts or opportunities.

reserve_tasks.title: Draft follow-up email
reserve_tasks.goal: Draft a follow-up using CRM context.

reserve_tasks.title: Prioritize accounts
reserve_tasks.goal: Rank accounts by urgency or opportunity value.

explicit_exclusions: Forecast governance workflows as hard requirements
